finding_results.notes: Kept the family-message dissonance on the page, isolated the CLOSE/ARCHIVE beat, and replaced the soothing tomato-status final line with Noor's live tactical recognition that the only path to the mechanical plant still runs through Lena.

summary: Reworked the chapter close so it no longer exits on a calming garden update; it now preserves the relay-message contrast and ends on the unresolved in-building pressure of Lena controlling access to the sublevel mechanical plant.
